name: Quinoa Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Can tomatoes, coarsely diced (reserve juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse quinoa and add to water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Set aside.
2. Steam green peppers until soft but not limp; set aside.
3. In a large skillet, sauté onion and mushrooms in butter. Add tomatoes, garlic cloves, and salsa. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes. Add sherry; simmer for another 10 minutes.
4. Fold the cooked quinoa into the mixture.
5. Place peppers in a baking dish and fill them with the quinoa mixture. Use about half of the mixture to fill each pepper. Thinly mix the remaining mixture with reserved juice and pour around the peppers.
6. Sprinkle cheese over the peppers.
7. Bake at 325°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
